response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ development experience on the Windows platform, a core requirement for this role. While they have some C/C++ experience (NI LabWindows/CVI), it is not recent or substantial enough to meet the seniority level expected. Additionally, there is no clear domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets, and no exposure to SQL Server or Oracle is evident. The resume highlights modern web and mobile development skills instead.
strengths: Strong multi-language proficiency (C++, Java, JavaScript, etc.) demonstrating adaptability
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization
Active open-source contributions and community involvement
concerns: Insufficient C++ Windows development experience (core requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income
No demonstrable experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/financial systems
